title: The Battle of the Big Sisters!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fan A
text_block_list.text: I heard Ines gets savage when you run with her! I bet you've never done that, right?

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Well, have you ever worked out with Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way to our next training session, Ines Fujin
and I stumble across a curious spat between fans.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep... And it sounds like it's over me and Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll go monitor the situation from where they can't
see me. If I wouldn't want to add fuel to the fire
by getting involved.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
Silence, please. Moving forward, raise your hand
if you wish to speak. Now, without further ado...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
Let us officially begin the fourth "Would You
Rather Have Ines or Ryan as Your Big Sister?"
debate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to present my pro-Ines argument! For
context, I must roll the clock back to a few days
ago...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew! See? There's nothing like a good run to
clear your worries!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You want to thank me with a gift? Don't
sweat it! I had fun! Let's run again sometime,
y'know, to clear our heads.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek, I knew it! Ines's kindness and humility are
on another level!

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Mrrgh... I would like to present my own argument
in Ryan's favor! Now, this all happened during a
workout session...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Look at your biceps... And listen to
what they have to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay—I'm right behind you. I'll spot you if get
into any trouble!

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan B
text_block_list.text: You must've felt so at ease! Ryan's just so reliable!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fan A
text_block_list.text: Why, you... Well I've been saving an argument that's gonna knock you right out!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yikes! I don't like where this is heading... Time to
step in!

text_block_list.name: Ines & Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't fight!
Fighting is wrong!

text_block_list.name: Ines & Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Debate Club Students
text_block_list.text: Ines?! Ryan?! Wh-what in the world is...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Guys, listen up! I get how you feel. I really do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But fighting's not the answer. I mean, Ines and I...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We get along like peanut butter and jelly-elly!
And I want you guys to have that same
relationship.

text_block_list.name: Debate Club Students
text_block_list.text: Eep! They're standing next to each other! I can't believe we're getting to see this up close!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Weren't you just about to fight each other?

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh. Nope, this happens all the time! Once the
debate heats up, we end up getting pretty
intense!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's right. When you two are the topic of
discussion, we all turn into a bunch of
motormouths...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that is reassuring... but, uh, I'm feeling
pretty embarrassed about... all of this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Ines and Ryan's everyday behavior
has captivated enough people to inspire an
organized debate community. ...I can see why
they might feel a little flustered.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... These underclassmen of mine are just so...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Adorably cute!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it? What's with the confusion?
choice_data_list:
It's just... You hardly seem bothered by any of
this...

It's just... You hardly seem bothered by any of
this...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Yep, not at all, not at all! I'm used to stuff
like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Makes sense, seeing how you've got all those
years of big sister experience under your belt!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeahhh. And as a big sister to these girls, I
couldn't be happier. ♪ It makes me want to repay
the favor somehow!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What do you think would be good, Trainer? I
want to thank my adorable admirers!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ooh. We've still got some time before training, so
why not! ♪

text_block_list.name: Debate Club Students
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Would you like to come too, Ryan? We'd
love to see you there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll come for sure. Oh, but... try to keep the
compliments to a minimum, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, surrounded by members of the debate
club, the two idols enjoy a wonderful tea party.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Would that be enough? I mean, I'll greet as many
people as you can bring, but...

text_block_list.name: Debate Club Students
text_block_list.text: You really get it, Trainer! This is the best present we could have asked for! We'd better make sure everyone gets to attend this one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait, there are other members besides you guys?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's great! Invite as many members as you like!
No number's out of the question for this big sis. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although confronted with an unexpectedly huge
horde of members, Ines Fujin meets and greets
them all with a caring and sisterly attitude.
